name: Upgrade Docker Compose
description: Stops running Docker Compose services, pulls updated images, and restarts. Used during in-place upgrades (no clone/replace needed).

parameters.name: Compose Project Name
parameters.description: Project name for Docker Compose (directory name). Defaults to container hostname.

parameters.name: Startup Timeout
parameters.description: Seconds to wait for Docker services to become healthy.

commands.name: Upgrade Docker Compose
commands.description: Stop, pull, and restart Docker Compose services
